items.claim: Max Holloway has maintained his sharpness and instincts by staying active in the octagon over the last five years.
items.quote: One guy has been in the octagon fighting for belts, getting sharp, staying active.

items.claim: Conor McGregor suffered from pre-existing stress fractures in his leg prior to his fight at UFC 264.
items.quote: His stress fractures were already there.

items.claim: Conor McGregor wore a walking boot during his training camp for UFC 264.
items.quote: His coach admitted afterwards that McGregor had been wearing a walking boot during camp.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's lack of consistent activity over the last five years has negatively impacted his fighting sharpness, timing, and instincts.
items.quote: The question is, what 5 years of not being a fighter does to someone who built everything on being exactly that. The sharpness, the timing, the instincts under pressure.

items.claim: Conor McGregor withdrew from the UFC 303 fight against Michael Chandler due to a broken toe.
Conor McGregor has prioritized business and lifestyle ventures over training and fighting for the past five years.
items.quote: For 5 years, it genuinely looked like all the other stuff was the priority.
